## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss partnership next steps and timeline for GrowthX and Vizcom collaboration on content strategy and SEO optimization.](https://fathom.video/share/hzqqsA9itbsZsvx3cdpizzMzuBwEzpid?tab=summary&timestamp=114.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Vizcom is undergoing a website migration from Framer to Webflow, impacting content publishing capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/hzqqsA9itbsZsvx3cdpizzMzuBwEzpid?tab=summary&timestamp=324.0)
  - [Emily (Vizcom VP) is expecting a child in mid-January, influencing timeline decisions](https://fathom.video/share/hzqqsA9itbsZsvx3cdpizzMzuBwEzpid?tab=summary&timestamp=287.0)
  - [Three potential kickoff timelines: pre-Thanksgiving, December, or Q2 2024 (least preferred)](https://fathom.video/share/hzqqsA9itbsZsvx3cdpizzMzuBwEzpid?tab=summary&timestamp=668.0)
  - [GrowthX needs clarity on Vizcom's SEO foundation to determine optimal start date and scope](https://fathom.video/share/hzqqsA9itbsZsvx3cdpizzMzuBwEzpid?tab=summary&timestamp=411.0)

## Topics

### Current Vizcom Situation

  - [Small marketing team with recent unexpected medical leave](https://fathom.video/share/hzqqsA9itbsZsvx3cdpizzMzuBwEzpid?tab=summary&timestamp=133.0)
  - [Website migration from Framer to Webflow in progress, targeting December completion](https://fathom.video/share/hzqqsA9itbsZsvx3cdpizzMzuBwEzpid?tab=summary&timestamp=324.0)
  - [Unoptimized SEO setup (keywords, headings, general structure)](https://fathom.video/share/hzqqsA9itbsZsvx3cdpizzMzuBwEzpid?tab=summary&timestamp=472.0)
  - [Emily expecting a child mid-January, impacting availability](https://fathom.video/share/hzqqsA9itbsZsvx3cdpizzMzuBwEzpid?tab=summary&timestamp=287.0)

### GrowthX Engagement Details

  - [Strategy sprint: 8 weeks, with weekly 1-hour kickoff (week 1) and 30-min syncs](https://fathom.video/share/hzqqsA9itbsZsvx3cdpizzMzuBwEzpid?tab=summary&timestamp=216.0)
  - [Expert interviews needed: product expert, sales representative](https://fathom.video/share/hzqqsA9itbsZsvx3cdpizzMzuBwEzpid?tab=summary&timestamp=263.0)
  - [Publishing starts week 4-5, aiming for 10 articles during strategy sprint](https://fathom.video/share/hzqqsA9itbsZsvx3cdpizzMzuBwEzpid?tab=summary&timestamp=361.0)
  - [Phase 2: Daily publishing post-strategy sprint](https://fathom.video/share/hzqqsA9itbsZsvx3cdpizzMzuBwEzpid?tab=summary&timestamp=390.0)

### Timeline Considerations

1.  Pre-Thanksgiving kickoff
      - [Pros: Earlier start, Emily available for strategy component](https://fathom.video/share/hzqqsA9itbsZsvx3cdpizzMzuBwEzpid?tab=summary&timestamp=668.0)
      - [Cons: Holiday interruptions, website migration incomplete](https://fathom.video/share/hzqqsA9itbsZsvx3cdpizzMzuBwEzpid?tab=summary&timestamp=668.0)
2.  December kickoff
      - [Pros: Closer to website completion, more prep time for team](https://fathom.video/share/hzqqsA9itbsZsvx3cdpizzMzuBwEzpid?tab=summary&timestamp=725.0)
      - [Cons: Less time with Emily, potential holiday disruptions](https://fathom.video/share/hzqqsA9itbsZsvx3cdpizzMzuBwEzpid?tab=summary&timestamp=725.0)
3.  Q2 2024 kickoff (least preferred)
      - [Pros: Completed website migration, Emily back from leave](https://fathom.video/share/hzqqsA9itbsZsvx3cdpizzMzuBwEzpid?tab=summary&timestamp=748.0)
      - [Cons: Significant delay in starting the engagement](https://fathom.video/share/hzqqsA9itbsZsvx3cdpizzMzuBwEzpid?tab=summary&timestamp=748.0)

### SEO and Content Optimization

  - [Current Vizcom site lacks keyword optimization and proper heading structure](https://fathom.video/share/hzqqsA9itbsZsvx3cdpizzMzuBwEzpid?tab=summary&timestamp=472.0)
  - [Uncertainty about division of SEO tasks between GrowthX and Vizcom](https://fathom.video/share/hzqqsA9itbsZsvx3cdpizzMzuBwEzpid?tab=summary&timestamp=411.0)
  - [Need to determine foundational SEO elements required before engagement](https://fathom.video/share/hzqqsA9itbsZsvx3cdpizzMzuBwEzpid?tab=summary&timestamp=411.0)

### Team Structure and Review Process

  - [Emily (VP) overseeing marketing](https://fathom.video/share/hzqqsA9itbsZsvx3cdpizzMzuBwEzpid?tab=summary&timestamp=827.0)
  - [New Product Marketing Manager (PMM) to be primary point of contact](https://fathom.video/share/hzqqsA9itbsZsvx3cdpizzMzuBwEzpid?tab=summary&timestamp=765.0)
  - [Initial reviews by Emily and CEO Jordan, transitioning to PMM](https://fathom.video/share/hzqqsA9itbsZsvx3cdpizzMzuBwEzpid?tab=summary&timestamp=827.0)
  - [Aim for streamlined approval process to avoid bottlenecks](https://fathom.video/share/hzqqsA9itbsZsvx3cdpizzMzuBwEzpid?tab=summary&timestamp=816.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to provide answers on SEO foundation requirements (within 1-2 days)](https://fathom.video/share/hzqqsA9itbsZsvx3cdpizzMzuBwEzpid?tab=summary&timestamp=865.0)
  - [Vizcom to return contract with any red lines ASAP](https://fathom.video/share/hzqqsA9itbsZsvx3cdpizzMzuBwEzpid?tab=summary&timestamp=865.0)
  - [Determine optimal kickoff date based on SEO requirements and Vizcom's readiness](https://fathom.video/share/hzqqsA9itbsZsvx3cdpizzMzuBwEzpid?tab=summary&timestamp=865.0)
  - [Clarify division of SEO optimization tasks between GrowthX and Vizcom](https://fathom.video/share/hzqqsA9itbsZsvx3cdpizzMzuBwEzpid?tab=summary&timestamp=411.0)
  - [Finalize team structure and review process for content approval](https://fathom.video/share/hzqqsA9itbsZsvx3cdpizzMzuBwEzpid?tab=summary&timestamp=765.0)
